results.title: Buy Alubox IP65 60 x 40 x 25 cm. at Alulock
results.snippet: The IP65 series is equipped with a sealing strip in the lid, silicone in all internal joints and IP65 approved, making it dust and water jet resistant. The IP65 series is stackable, as the corner brackets fit into each other. The boxes can be stacked across the series, except for the hobby series.
